skills.name: Stumble Upon
skills.flavor: You trip — and find something no one else noticed.
skills.effect: Reveal a hidden item or detail within 15ft.

skills.name: Rattled
skills.flavor: The near-miss shakes your nerves to their core.
skills.effect: Disadvantage on your next roll. Advantage on the one after that.

skills.name: Adrenaline Surge
skills.flavor: Failure fuels a desperate second wind.
skills.effect: Immediately take a bonus action this turn.

skills.name: Wrong Footing
skills.flavor: Your stumble puts you exactly where they didn't expect.
skills.effect: Move up to 10ft without provoking opportunity attacks.

skills.name: Exposed
skills.flavor: The failure leaves you open — everyone sees it.
skills.effect: The next attack against you has advantage.

skills.name: Dropped Guard
skills.flavor: A split second of distraction — someone notices.
skills.effect: -2 AC until the start of your next turn.

skills.name: Fresh Eyes
skills.flavor: Starting the session with a clear head, you notice something others missed.
skills.effect: Once this session, ask the DM one yes/no question they must answer truthfully.

skills.name: Bad Omen
skills.flavor: A crow flies left. Your gut sinks.
skills.effect: The DM must foreshadow one danger you will face this session.

skills.name: Inspired
skills.flavor: Something in the air today — you feel unusually sharp.
skills.effect: Add 1d4 to the first ability check you make this session.

skills.name: Aching Bones
skills.flavor: Last session took more out of you than you realized.
skills.effect: Start with 2 fewer HP. Recover them after a short rest.

skills.name: Crowd Pleaser
skills.flavor: Somehow even your worst moments make for a good story.
skills.effect: Gain advantage on the next Charisma check you make.

skills.name: Gut Feeling
skills.flavor: You can't explain it. You just know.
skills.effect: The DM tells you if the current path leads toward danger or safety.

skills.name: Wild Swing
skills.flavor: Something takes over — reckless, powerful, uncontrolled.
skills.effect: Next attack: roll twice, use higher result. On a hit, add 1d6 damage. On a miss, you fall prone.

skills.name: Borrowed Time
skills.flavor: That should have killed you. It didn't. Yet.
skills.effect: Gain 1d8 temporary HP. Lose them all at the start of your next turn.

skills.name: Old Wound
skills.flavor: Something stirs — a memory of pain, not quite healed.
skills.effect: Lose 1d4 HP now. Gain resistance to that damage type for the rest of the encounter.

skills.name: Overconfident
skills.flavor: You've done this a hundred times. What could go wrong?
skills.effect: Disadvantage on Wisdom saves until the end of the session.

skills.name: Last Resort
skills.flavor: When your back is against the wall, something awakens.
skills.effect: If you're at or below half HP, your next attack is a critical hit.

skills.name: Fortune Smiles
skills.flavor: The dice gods owe you one.
skills.effect: Reroll any one die this session. You must use the new result.
